# Atul Thorat — UX Designer Portfolio

> Hi, I'm Atul — a UX designer in Pune crafting friendly mobile and SaaS apps for logistics and mobility. This is my portfolio, including the Youhonk delivery, customer, and vendor apps.

## Pages

- [Home](/): A warm intro with case studies, skills, story, and ways to reach me.
- [Youhonk Delivery App Case Study](/case-study/delivery): Designing a real-time app for vehicle pickup & drop.
- [Youhonk Customer App Case Study](/case-study/customer): A simple way to book vehicle repairs from your phone.
- [Youhonk Vendor App Case Study](/case-study/vendor): A vendor portal for smooth bookings and workshop ops.
